steps.title: Identify initial value and rate
steps.content: The elephant calf starts at 226 pounds (initial value) and gains 3 pounds daily (rate of change). The linear model form is $ y = ext{initial} + ext{rate} \cdot x $. $$y = 226 + 3x$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Eliminate incorrect operations
steps.content: Choices B and D subtract 3x, which would imply weight loss — contradicts the problem. Choices C and D incorrectly swap the initial value and rate. Only choice A maintains the correct initial weight of 226 with a positive 3x growth.
